subcodes.first_line: O pure and tranquil leaf, content and well-pleasing, that handmaid of God was afflicted with every tribulation in the path of the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه مطمئنه راضیه مرضیه آن امة الله در سبیل الهی بهر مصیبتی گرفتار شد
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @soul; spirit after death
